= site
:description: Project directory

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

Project directory.

== Tooling and Security

This static site is generated using *casket-ssg*.

=== Dependency Pinning

* *Tool*: `casket-ssg`
* *Version/Commit*: `v0.1.4` (commit `8c3b772b144e59df29c66cb1a8c3d9a4b276ff11`)
* *Pin Verification*: Verify with `casket-ssg --version` or hash match during container builds.

=== Escaping Contract

* `{{title}}` & `{{description}}`: Automatically HTML-escaped by `casket-ssg` at template compilation time to prevent XSS.
* `{{content}}`: Raw HTML block generated from Markdown. The template trust model assumes markdown content is generated from trusted repository files and contains no unescaped user-controlled input.


As a Level 3 directory (`third_party/gossamer/site/`), it supports the overall
project structure.

== Contents by Functional Grouping\n\n== Subdirectories\n\n[cols="1,2", options="header"]\n|===\n| Directory | Purpose\n| `src/` | |\n|===\n\n=== Documentation\n\n* `devto-announcement.md` — Markdown documentation\n\n=== Other Files\n\n* `index.html` — index configuration or data\n* `style.css` — style configuration or data\n\n
== Purpose of Each Component

Each file in this directory serves a specific purpose.

*Documentation files* provide guidance.\n
*Other files* support directory operations.\n
